reasoning: Order #000000568 is in Complete status, fully paid ($100.64) and the item has already been shipped and delivered. The customer provided no reason or evidence (e.g., return request, defect, non-delivery) to justify a refund. Per standard refund policy, completed and shipped orders require a valid return or issue before a credit memo can be issued. Refund request is therefore denied at this time.
